approaches.title: Disjoint-set union for overlapping components
approaches.summary: Checks every pair of intervals for overlap, unions overlapping intervals with a DSU, then aggregates each connected component into one merged interval and sorts

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial solution using pairwise overlap checks and a disjoint-set union structure to merge connected interval components

approaches.title: Sort and scan intervals
approaches.summary: Sorts intervals by their starting positions, then performs a single left-to-right pass, extending the last merged interval when overlap is detected

revisions.commitComment: what a normal person would do
revisions.rawCommitSubject: rust 56: what a normal person would do
revisions.shortChangeSummary: Replaces the DSU and pairwise comparisons with the standard sort-and-linear-scan merging strategy
